projectDescription: Zig is an AI sales execution platform that gives every sales rep a team of AI agents to handle research, outreach, meeting prep, follow-ups, CRM sync, and pipeline hygiene — so reps can focus on closing.
keyFeatures: AI agent team covering the full revenue motion (Research, Outreach, Meetings, Follow-Up, CRM Sync, Pipeline)
ZigScribe — live meeting listener that auto-drafts follow-ups and updates CRM
Lookalike account intelligence — surfaces similar prospects when a deal closes
ZigMobile — field-first mobile app with badge/business card scanning
Voice commands — call your Zig agent to update CRM or send follow-ups hands-free
Outcome-based pricing — pay per execution pool, not per seat
Compounding revenue intelligence — learns from every call, email, and deal over time
One-tap approval flows for AI-drafted actions
AI Agent Inbound Engine — web intent tracking, ad inbound monitoring, lead qualification and routing
ZigLead enrichment — cross-verified contact and company data
publicApiSurface: AI Agent Inbound Engine (web intent, ad monitoring, lead routing)
